name: Hims & Hers Health, Inc.
business: Hims & Hers sells prescription and non-prescription health and wellness products, including compounded medications, and offers telehealth consultations and laboratory testing services. Products are sold directly to consumers via its websites and mobile apps, and through wholesale retail partnerships. The company focuses on chronic conditions such as sexual health, hair loss, weight loss, and mental health.
sellsTo: Health system collaborations (referral partnerships, no monetary exchange)

exposures.sentence: Our digital platform enables access to treatments for a broad range of chronic conditions, including those related to sexual health, hair loss, hormone health, weight loss, dermatology, and mental health, as well as services such as comprehensive laboratory testing.

Our digital platform enables access to treatments for a broad range of chronic conditions, including those related to sexual health, hair loss, hormone health, weight loss, dermatology, and mental health, as well as services such as comprehensive laboratory testing.
In addition, certain of our workflows involve the use of at-home sample collection kits that we make available to customers.
We also offer over-the-counter drug and device products and cosmetics and supplement products, which are primarily focused on general wellness, skincare, sexual health and wellness, and hair care.
Our products and services are available for purchase directly by customers on our websites and mobile applications.

catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we announced a definitive agreement to acquire Eucalyptus, an Australia-based digital health company that operates in Australia, the United Kingdom, Germany, Canada, and Japan. The acquisition is expected to close in the middle of 2026.
